Riverside Dental Care is a modern family dental practice located at 456 River Road in Portland, Oregon. Led by Dr. Sarah Chen, who has over 12 years of experience serving Portland families, the practice specializes in gentle, anxiety-free dental care. The clinic uses advanced technology including digital X-rays and same-day crown capabilities to provide efficient, comfortable treatment. Services include comprehensive preventive care, restorative dentistry, family dentistry for all ages, and same-day crowns using CEREC technology. The practice focuses on creating a welcoming, stress-free environment where patients feel comfortable and confident. Dr. Chen and her team are committed to building lasting relationships with families through compassionate care and modern dental techniques. Office hours are Monday through Thursday 8am-5pm and Friday 8am-2pm. Patients can reach the practice at (503) 555-8900 to schedule appointments.
